creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2007-07-28 22:03:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/notecase   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    deskutils/notecase/files patch-Makefile 
                             patch-src_gui_GuiLanguage.cpp 
                             patch-src_lib_CircularBuffer.cpp 
                             patch-src_main.cpp 
  Log:
  NoteCase is a hierarchical text notes manager (a.k.a. outliner). It helps you
  organize your everyday text notes into a single document with individual notes
  placed into a tree-like structure. To ensure your privacy an encrypted document
  format is supported along with a standard unencrypted one.
  
  WWW: http://notecase.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/114730
  Submitted by:   Yinghong.Liu <relaxbsd@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.302     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/deskutils/notecase/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/deskutils/notecase/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +109 -0    ports/deskutils/notecase/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/deskutils/notecase/files/patch-src_gui_GuiLanguage.cpp (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/deskutils/notecase/files/patch-src_lib_CircularBuffer.cpp (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/deskutils/notecase/files/patch-src_main.cpp (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/deskutils/notecase/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +50 -0     ports/deskutils/notecase/pkg-plist (new)
